name: Stuffed Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Depending on the size of the squash, allow 1/2 per person.
2. Parboil whole squash in salted water until tender. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Slice the squash lengthwise and scoop out the center into a bowl.
4. Add an equal amount of finely diced yellow cheese, a little cream or milk, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Return the mixture to the squash shell.
6. Top with fine bread crumbs and dot with butter.
7. Bake until the cheese is melted.
